title: styphelia oblongifolia
intro: Styphelia oblongifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the Tasmanian pepperbush due to its peppery leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Styphelia oblongifolia include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used as a tea or added to remedies for their medicinal properties.
